---
title: "plot_instructions.qmd"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Data used located in

```{r}

orange_cases <- read_csv("../data/cleaned/orange_cases.csv")
```


```{r}
ggplot(
     orange_cases, 
     aes(x = date, y = cumulative_cases)) + 
     geom_line() + 
     labs(
           x = "Date",
           y = "Cumulative Cases",
           title = "Total COVID19 Cases Evolution in Orange County"
       )
```

To use plot_orange_cases.rds to load the plot object itself and make changes on it:

```{r}
orange_cases_plot <- readRDS("figures/orange_cases_plot.rds")

orange_cases_plot
```

Then you can make changes like

```{r}
orange_cases_plot +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Edited title")
```
